title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Mastery Check
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a skill test and release harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.
Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Instruction Tests evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Instruction Tests assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a changed quiz case for agent ext skill testing that tests this competency: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Instruction Tests has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: Name the Instruction Tests precondition or invariant that the quiz case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed quiz case for agent ext skill testing that tests this competency: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A readable SKILL.md guarantees correct execution.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints for the quiz Instruction Tests case
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the quiz Instruction Tests case
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence for the quiz Instruction Tests case
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the quiz Instruction Tests case

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The decision applies Instruction Tests to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Instruction Tests.
